name: claudex
description: Use OpenAI Codex (GPT-5.x) as a balanced sub-agent under Claude Code: save Anthropic tokens on exploration and drafting while Claude supervises and reviews for quality.

plugins.name: codex-subagent
plugins.description: Registers the Codex MCP server and teaches Claude Code to delegate exploration, drafting, second-opinion review, and edge-case hunting to Codex (GPT-5.x) in a balanced posture. Claude supervises and reviews before applying. Bundles a skill, a /codex command, and a SessionStart policy.
